projects.title: Love Bici
projects.description: A website with many design flaws and poorly implemented online store functionality, which I had to recreate from scratch so the online store works correctly.

projects.title: Ibiza Circular
projects.description: Designed and programmed the web from scratch. Made sure it had a beautiful and user-friendly design, following the official rules of the Consell de Ibiza.

projects.title: Love Formentera
projects.description: I did a study so people can find the house on Google and prepared an elegant design for the website. I also took the photos and manage social networks to promote it.

projects.title: APP Ibiza Circular
projects.description: Programmed the visual part of the website used by the Consell for Ibiza Circular, showing all information in clear charts and organized lists to make it easy to read.

projects.title: Embargos APP
projects.description: They notified me in the afternoon and by morning it was ready: I programmed a clean and modern website in just an hour and a half to present it on time.

projects.title: La Vie Éternelle
projects.description: Designed the image of a luxury watch brand and programmed its website with 5 pages. I gave it an elegant style and took great care of every detail to convey quality.

projects.title: Client Portfolio App
projects.description: For an agency, I programmed the entire web application to manage clients. Only a small part was missing because another more urgent project had to be prioritized.

projects.title: My Portfolio
projects.description: My first modern project with new tools I learned on my own. I programmed a fast and beautiful website to show what I can do.

projects.title: E-Learning Platform
projects.description: A website where students can register, take courses and exams. I programmed it entirely so it is dynamic and comfortable for learning.

projects.title: Siete y Medio Game
projects.description: An online card game where you can play from the browser, with a fun and interactive experience.

projects.title: School Supplies Web
projects.description: An online store of school supplies with an AI virtual assistant to help the customer quickly.

projects.title: Color Generator
projects.description: A tool for designers that generates 10 different shades of the same color, to easily create harmonic combinations.
